Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Victor Galli, Sr. As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Victor Galli, Sr. as Successor-in-Interest to, and Substituting Successor-in-Interest for, Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed. Victor Galli Sr. is substituted as successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff Michael Syzmanski. Plaintiff's request to file a First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared herein, as of the date of the granting of the motion to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee; Matter Not Reported (503/CML)
